_comment: Product English: shell/Welcome/Settings; real phrases, no camelCase stubs.
ui.brand.name: Name
ui.diagnostics.title: Diagnostics
ui.dialog.create_project.message: Enter a project name, then choose where to save it. A folder with the same name will be created there.
ui.dialog.create_project.pick_parent_tit: Choose parent folder (project will be created inside)
ui.dialog.create_project.title: New project
ui.dialog.git.restore.message: checkpoint {commit} ， switch 「{branch}」。 Save current Save changes。
ui.dialog.git.restore.title: Restore checkpoint
ui.dialog.open_project.not_project_statu: Selected folder is not an initialized project
ui.dialog.settings.remove_provider.block:
Provider “{provider}” ({id}) is still referenced below. Change these references first, then remove again:

{references}
ui.dialog.settings.remove_provider.title: Remove provider from project
ui.dialog.unsaved.message: You have unsaved changes that will be lost if you leave. Save first?
ui.dialog.unsaved.message_page: “{page}” has unsaved changes that will be lost if you leave. Save first?
ui.dialog.unsaved.save_partial: Saved: {done}; could not save “{page}”. The project stays as it is.
ui.dialog.unsaved.title: Save changes
ui.dialog.workspace.all_nodes.title: Apply to all nodes
ui.dialog.workspace.annotate_all.message: No node is selected. The annotation will apply to all nodes on the canvas.
ui.dialog.workspace.cut_node.message: Cutting removes the node and its edges from the canvas and puts the node on the clipboard.
ui.dialog.workspace.cut_node.title: Cut node
ui.dialog.workspace.delete_node.message: Deleting a node also removes edges connected to it. Save the workflow to write the change to disk.
ui.dialog.workspace.delete_node.title: Delete node
ui.dialog.workspace.pack_all.message: No node is selected. Packing into a subflow will apply to all canvas nodes and rewrite the current workflow.
ui.dialog.workspace.pack_all.title: Pack all nodes
After rejection, the run continues with the rejected outcome and the confirmation record is updated.
ui.dialog.workspace.stop_run.message: Stopping the current workflow run cancels unfinished nodes.
ui.dialog.workspace.stop_run.title: Stop run
ui.empty.git.title: Title
ui.empty.need_project.title: Title
ui.empty.run_log.title: Title
ui.empty.works.index.title: Title
ui.empty.workspace.ai.title: Title
ui.empty.workspace.start.title: Title
ui.error.conflict: Content was updated by another operation. Refresh and try again.
ui.error.external: An external service is temporarily unavailable. Try again later.
ui.error.external_outcome_unknown: The external outcome could not be confirmed. Automatic retries have stopped.
ui.error.internal: Internal state is inconsistent. Check diagnostics and try again.
ui.error.io: A local file read/write error occurred. Check disk permissions and try again.
ui.error.ipc: Could not connect to the local backend. Restart the app and try again.
ui.error.legacy_run: This run record lacks a frozen definition and cannot be safely restored. Start the workflow again.
ui.error.network: Could not reach the service. Check the network or whether the backend is running.
ui.error.not_found: The requested content could not be found. It may have been moved or deleted.
ui.error.operation_failed: The operation did not complete. Please try again later.
ui.error.permission: You do not have permission for this operation.
ui.error.resource_limit: The operation exceeded a resource limit. Narrow the scope and try again.
ui.error.serialization: The data format could not be read. Check the project files.
ui.error.validation: The input is not valid. Check it and try again.
ui.feedback.message: Describe the problem, reproduction steps, and expected behavior, then submit it to the project maintainers. Open a new Issue in the Ariadne repository.
ui.feedback.open_failed: Could not open a browser. Open the repository Issues page manually.
ui.feedback.title: Feedback
ui.git.author: Author
ui.git.checkpoint.placeholder: What should this checkpoint note say?
ui.git.head: Head
ui.git.reason.no_commits: The repository has no commits yet
ui.git.reason.not_repository: The current project directory is not a Git repository
ui.git.title: Versions
ui.maintenance.banner_active: Project maintenance in progress ({kind} · {phase}). Saves and runs are blocked until it finishes.
ui.maintenance.banner_failed: Project maintenance failed ({kind} · {phase}): {error}. Fix the issue before saving or running.
ui.run_log.error.title: Title
ui.run_log.filtered_empty.title: Title
ui.run_log.title: Title
ui.settings.automation.budget_help: Daily spend cap (USD). Enter 0 for unlimited.
ui.settings.automation.confirmation.appr: Describe how to audit this confirmation and require an approval decision with reasons.
ui.settings.automation.confirmation.help: Normal mode: on = allow by default, off = manual review. Auto Mode: on = auto-audit pass, off = skip confirmation by default (still not manual review).
ui.settings.automation.confirmation.note: Default policy Project Auto Mode config； node policy node Override 。
ui.settings.automation.scope_help: Budgets, spending, confirmation policies, and workflow runtime limits belong to the current project.
ui.settings.automation.preauthorized_hel: Spend allowed in Auto Mode before pause (USD). 0 = unlimited.
ui.settings.automation.title: Automation
ui.settings.general.scope_help: The project name, content directories, and project memory belong only to the current project.
ui.settings.general.title: General
ui.settings.misc.app_runtime_scope_help: The Qdrant binary path and startup timeout are global application settings shared across projects on this device.
ui.settings.misc.retrieval_scope_help: Collection identity, dimensions, service endpoint, data directory, and chunking stay with the current project.
ui.settings.misc.title: Misc
ui.settings.models.api_key.placeholder: Leave empty to keep the current key
ui.settings.models.base_url.placeholder: Required for compatible APIs; leave empty for official providers
ui.settings.models.desc: config modelProvider API key。API key Save ， UI display。
ui.settings.models.models.placeholder: One model per line: id, capability, context, input price, output price
ui.settings.models.provider_added: Draft provider {id} added; save to apply.
ui.settings.models.scope_help: Provider type, name, endpoint, enabled state, and model catalog are global app settings. This project stores only authorization, default roles, and isolated credentials.
ui.settings.models.remove_blocked: This provider is still referenced by a workflow, active run, or node preset and cannot be removed.
ui.settings.models.removed: Removed this project's authorization for provider “{provider}” and deleted its project credentials. The global provider catalog remains available.
ui.settings.models.title: Models
ui.settings.permissions.danger_tools.hel: These can change files or read sensitive data. Leave off by default; enable only in workflows you trust.
ui.settings.permissions.desc: Manage the hard permission and tool boundaries used by every project.
ui.settings.permissions.global_defaults_: Application-wide defaults. Workflow nodes and Project AI can inherit or define a more specific policy.
ui.settings.permissions.scope_help: These permissions are stored in this application's local settings and apply to every project. Project node presets store only node-specific overrides.
ui.settings.permissions.path_placeholder: Absolute path, press Enter to add
ui.settings.permissions.safe_tools.title: Read-only
ui.settings.permissions.title: Permissions
ui.settings.personalization.color_map_hi: Click the spectrum, drag the sliders, or type a color value.
ui.settings.personalization.color_rgb_hi: Adjust custom colors with RGB sliders; the swatch previews live. Hex is a secondary input only.
ui.settings.personalization.reduce_motio: Turn off non-essential canvas motion and zoom transitions. Instant selection, zoom, and status feedback stay.
ui.settings.personalization.theme.custom: Select Main / Surface / Accent first, then open the color picker. With follow system, edit day and night separately.
ui.settings.personalization.theme.follow: Custom colors follow system light/dark (edit day and night separately)
ui.settings.personalization.title: Personalization
ui.settings.personalization.scope_help: Language, theme, motion, colors, and panel state are application-wide preferences shared by every project.
ui.settings.presets.node_defaults.desc: new node fill model、 budget timeoutDefault 。
ui.settings.presets.title: Presets
ui.settings.presets.scope_help: The template repository, models, and timeouts are global authoring preferences shared across projects; budgets and node permission or tool overrides apply only to the current project.
ui.settings.status.section_load_failed: This section failed to load; saving is disabled.
ui.settings.title: Settings
ui.settings.validation.path_line: {field} line {line} must be a valid, unique path.
{field} line {line} must contain a valid path.
ui.template.builtin.novel_starter.name: Long-form Novel Starter
ui.template.builtin.review_polish.name: Review and Polish
ui.template.builtin.worldbuilding.name: Worldbuilding
ui.template.end: You have reached the end of the template list.
ui.template.permission_dialog.title: Title
ui.template.repository_missing: No template repository is configured. Add one in Settings.
ui.template.title: Templates
ui.theme.amber.desc: Warm off-white base with amber-gold accents — a paper-like warm workspace.
ui.theme.azure.desc: Neutral light base with clear azure accents — a clean daytime workspace.
ui.theme.contrast.desc: Higher contrast for edges and text — better for projection or low vision.
ui.theme.dark.desc: Dark, low-glare theme for night writing.
ui.theme.dusk.desc: Deep base with dusk-pink accents — softer for night sessions.
ui.theme.ink.desc: Document-oriented light theme — quieter reading surfaces for long prose.
ui.theme.light.desc: Soft light workspace for long editing sessions.
ui.theme.rose.desc: Neutral light base with rose accents — soft and warm without glare.
ui.theme.slate.desc: Cool deep slate base with bright blue accents — a steady dark workspace.
ui.theme.system.desc: Follows the operating system light/dark preference automatically.
ui.theme.violet.desc: Neutral light base with violet accents — a calm, refined light theme.
ui.tutorial.step.confirmations: When a decision is needed it appears in the workspace; work continues only after you approve.
ui.tutorial.title: Title
ui.version.commercial: Commercial use needs a separate written license. Sponsoring the project does not grant commercial rights.
ui.version.title: Title
ui.welcome.create_hint: Pick a name and a folder; we’ll create the project for you.
